name: louisjarvis-design-variants
description: 10 website design variants for louisjarvis.com — React + Vite + TypeScript SPAs with nautical/ocean aesthetic

scripts.dev: echo 'Run from a variant directory: cd 01-abyssal-glass && pnpm dev'
scripts.build:all: for d in 0*; do echo "Building $d..."; cd "$d" && pnpm build && cd ..; done
scripts.lint:all: for d in 0*; do echo "Linting $d..."; cd "$d" && pnpm lint && cd ..; done
